name: io.github.rendobar/mcp
title: Rendobar
description: Rendobar — serverless media processing for AI agents

environmentVariables.name: RENDOBAR_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Rendobar API key (starts with 'rb_'). Get one at https://app.rendobar.com/settings/api-keys. The server starts without it so tools can be listed, but tool calls require it.
